label: Create page
description: Scaffold a simple singleton page for the fixture app, including Tentman config, starter content, and a working SvelteKit route.

inputs.label: Page title
inputs.description: The human-friendly page name shown in Tentman and in the starter content.

inputs.label: URL slug
inputs.description: Used for route paths, content paths, and the Tentman config id.

inputs.label: Show in navigation
inputs.description: Add the new page to Tentman's navigation manifest preview.

confirmation.title: Create {{title}}
summary: This will create a new page at /{{slug}}.
The page will be editable in Tentman as {{title}}.
A SvelteKit route and server load will be scaffolded for this page.

summary.text: This page will be added to Tentman navigation.

notes.text: Review the generated copy and styling so the new page feels at home with the rest of the fixture app.
